name: Sunny Citrus Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in grapefruit juice.
2. Add the boiling orange juice, orange extract, and sugar to the softened gelatin. Stir until all ingredients are dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
4. Chill the mixture until it is partially set.
5. Sprinkle chopped walnuts over the top if desired.
Serving Information:
- This recipe yields approximately 16 pieces, each about 2 inches by 2 inches.
- One serving without nuts contains 24 Calories - 1/2 fruit and vegetable choice.
- One serving with nuts contains 33 Calories - 1/2 fruit and vegetable choice and 1/2 fats and oils choice.
